mapper.select: SELECT id, content_type, content_id, sentence, translation, note, sort_order, created_at FROM ielts_examples WHERE content_type = #{contentType} AND content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY sort_order, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_examples (id, content_type, content_id, sentence, translation, note, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{contentType}, #{contentId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{sentence}, #{translation}, #{note}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO ielts_examples (id, content_type, content_id, sentence, translation, note, sort_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{e.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{e.contentType}, #{e.contentId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{e.sentence}, #{e.translation}, #{e.note}, #{e.sortOrder}, #{e.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ielts_examples WHERE content_type = #{contentType} AND content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=OTHER}
